title: Some Little Enchant
description:
Added some little enchant，perhaps more will be added in the future?
now,we have disarm,snatching
body:
add some little enchants.
disarm,using enchanted "disarm" items to attack enemies will take away their main hand's belongings and put them in your backpack. If the main hand has nothing, it will take away the deputy's belongings.
Snatching,Attacking enemies with enchanted "Snatching" items will take away their armor in the order of "Helmet", "Chestplate", "Leggings", and "boots" and put it in your backpack.
It's made with mcreator.
